# synthetic, derived from packages/core/src/output/json-formatter.ts
# (google-gemini/gemini-cli, main branch): JsonFormatter.formatError()'s
# shape — no response, no stats, error only. This is the top-level-exception
# path (e.g. auth failure before any turn starts), distinct from a per-turn
# error that still carries stats (see parser_test.go for that combined case).
{
  "error": {
    "type": "AuthenticationError",
    "message": "Please run `gemini auth login` to authenticate.",
    "code": 401
  }
}
